ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemons" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "name2" TEXT /* Alternate name or form of the Pokémon (if applicable) */,
  "primary_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "secondary_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the secondary type of the Pokémon (if applicable) */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* HP (Hit Points) stat of the Pokémon */,
  "sp_attack" INTEGER /* Special Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "sp_defense" INTEGER /* Special Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed stat of the Pokémon */,
  "total_stats" INTEGER /* Total of all stats of the Pokémon */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points for the Pokémon */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Generation ID the Pokémon belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemons_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemons_primary_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_type_id") REFERENCES pokemon_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemons_secondary_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("secondary_type_id") REFERENCES pokemon_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., GRASS, POISON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "weaknesses" TEXT /* List of types the Pokémon is weak to */,
  "resistances" TEXT /* List of types the Pokémon resists */,
  "immunities" TEXT /* List of types the Pokémon is immune to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon the form belongs to */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form (e.g., Mega Venusaur) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the form */,
  "introduced_in_generation_id" INTEGER /* Generation ID the form was introduced in */,
  "is_default_form" INTEGER /* Whether this form is the default form of the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_forms_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_forms_introduced_in_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("introduced_in_generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_evolution" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution entry */,
  "base_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base Pokémon */,
  "evolved_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evolved Pokémon */,
  "evolution_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evolution method (e.g., level up, use item) */,
  "evolution_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the evolution (e.g., stage 1, stage 2) */,
  "minimum_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required for evolution */,
  "minimum_happiness" INTEGER /* Minimum happiness required for evolution */,
  "minimum_affection" INTEGER /* Minimum affection required for evolution */,
  "evolution_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item required for evolution (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_evolution_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolution_item_id") REFERENCES evolution_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_evolved_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolved_pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_evolution_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolution_method_id") REFERENCES evolution_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_base_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolution_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the evolution method (e.g., Level Up, Use Item) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evolution method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolution_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the evolution item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evolution item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon the metadata belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Pokémon */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the Pokémon */,
  "historical_data" TEXT /* Historical data and notes about the Pokémon */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the Pokémon (e.g., Common, Uncommon, Rare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_metadata_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effectiveness entry */,
  "attacking_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attacking type */,
  "defending_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defending type */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness value (e.g., 0.5, 1.0, 2.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_effectiveness_attacking_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("attacking_type_id") REFERENCES pokemon_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_effectiveness_defending_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("defending_type_id") REFERENCES pokemon_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, trainer, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the Pokémon data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the Pokémon data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., admin, regular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, trainer, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the generation */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the generation */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)
